message:
feat(usage): add depletion prediction to UsageInfo

Add burn rate integration and depletion forecasting to enable smart
preemptive account rotation before hitting rate limits.

New fields:
- BurnRate: token consumption rate from log/session data
- EstimatedDepletion: predicted time when limit will be hit
- DepletionConfidence: reliability score (0-1) of prediction

New functions:
- PredictDepletion(): calculates depletion time from current usage
  and burn rate, capped at window reset time
- UpdateDepletion(): convenience method to update depletion fields
- TimeToDepletion(): duration until estimated depletion
- IsDepletionImminent(): checks if within threshold
- DepletionWarningLevel(): returns 0 (none), 1 (approaching), 2 (imminent)

22 new tests covering prediction, updates, and warning levels.

Closes: caam-3vsd

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
